## Action Items

### 🔴 Urgent (this week)

- **Resolve or scope down canart-bot #4** — Docker socket + root container RCE has been open 17 days. Either ship the rootless container migration or document why the risk is accepted (e.g., single-tenant deployment). Pre-cutover is the wrong time to leave this open.
- **Land canart-bot #12** — No CI = every prompt change ships blind. Even a minimal pytest job in GitHub Actions would close the worst of this.
- **Triage store PR #29** — 5 days unmerged. Doc PR shouldn't block; either review-and-land or close with explanation.

### 📅 This week

- **canlah-web dormancy check** — 46 days since init commit. Is this blocked on design? Deprioritized for bot work? Surface to leadership.
- **travel-bot heartbeat** — no feature commits in ~7 weeks. Confirm the product is still in active development or move to maintenance mode officially.
- **canart-bot #1 (PNG→SVG)** — 42-day-old enhancement. Decide: V2 roadmap item, or close as out-of-scope.

### 🧹 Housekeeping

- Most stale repos share an identical 2026-04-23 agent-kb wiring commit. That rollout is **done**; quiet repos are expected. Consider adding a label or README badge marking which repos are "active dev" vs "maintenance" so this report stops flagging the latter as stale.
- `pm-agent` is the only repo with consistent automated cadence — good. Replicate this pattern (auto-commit on milestone) elsewhere if useful.
